title: passiflora cochinchinensis subsp. glaberrima
intro: Passiflora cochinchinensis subsp. glaberrima, also known as the Chinese passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Passiflora. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Passiflora cochinchinensis subsp. glaberrima include reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as relieving muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. It is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
